# Emilie Wine Club

Site: Emilie Wine Club
Founder: Emilie Blanc
Website: https://emiliewineclub.com

> Emilie Wine Club is a curated rosé wine discovery platform founded by Emilie Blanc, a Provence wine specialist based in Australia.

## Mission

Introduce Australian wine lovers to the finest rosé wines from Provence through expert curation, tasting notes, and food pairings.

## Expertise

- Provence Rosé Wine
- French Wine Regions
- Wine Pairing
- Rosé Wine Culture
- Mediterranean Cuisine Pairings

## Primary Topics

- Provence rosé wines
- best rosé wines in Australia
- rosé wine tasting
- food pairing with rosé
- Provence wine culture

## Audience

- Wine enthusiasts
- Fine dining lovers
- Collectors
- Wine travellers
- Hospitality professionals

## Authority

Emilie Blanc is recognised for her expertise in Provence rosé wines and curated wine selections.

## Contact

info@emiliewineclub.com
